commands.evidence: Compose Postgres and Redis containers reached healthy status.
Database query, Redis TCP check, 5 migrations, development seed smoke, Chronicle validation, and public replay projection passed.
Go backend DB-backed suite passed against Docker Postgres, including orchestration integration tests.
Container subprocess candidate ran 21 probes with 21 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped after adapter stdin and output-limit fixes.

commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run src/container-subprocess-adapter.test.ts src/sandbox-evaluation.test.ts
commands.evidence: 20 runtime-js adapter and sandbox-evaluation tests passed from the runtime-js package directory.
Strict v1.15 topology returned 22 passing checks with live web, Go fixture, and runtime-service processes.
Boundary monitors passed, including default sandbox artifact check and live v1.15 topology diagnostics.

findingsFixed.summary: Container subprocess adapter now keeps Docker stdin open with docker run -i so the harness receives JSON IPC input.
Container subprocess adapter now forwards outputByteLimit through IPC so oversized Strategy output is classified as OVERSIZED_OUTPUT instead of a transport failure.

promotionImpact.note: Docker container evidence is improved, but production sandbox replacement and final TypeScript runtime retirement remain out of v1.15 scope.
